R-001.summary: Warning source-of-truth and dirty/scope signaling repaired; final PASS cannot hide active/internal warnings.

R-002.summary: Default dossier path changed to markdown/json no-PDF; verifier detects PDF members.

R-004.summary: recent parser reads command receipts/check-all reports and labels unparsed only with reason.

R-005.summary: Renderer compacts displayed paths with REPO/ADMIN/RUNS/RUN aliases while machine files retain full paths.

R-006.summary: Shell identity, crests, and command hints improved; true sticky scroll is documented as terminal limitation.

R-007.summary: schema-regression command/check added with stdlib fallback.

R-009.summary: KPD default output begins with compact scorecard.

R-010.summary: Identity/crest contract embodied in shell layout; common-base extraction plan created.
